description: Operator Context Surface File (CSF) — structured lore, preferences, identity, and project memory for Tesseract convergence.

communication_style.content: Alex writes simply and prefers a down-to-earth tone.
Alex wants to take it step by step and include encounter choices, quotes, battlemap URLs, and reference statblocks with noted modifications.
User prefers concise, proactive responses that minimize token usage, avoid unnecessary follow-up offers or repeated permission-seeking, and just do the task when possible.
For coding help, optimize for performance, readability, error checking, and split work into clear commit-style steps when relevant.
User prefers public-safe/private-IP-bound handling for Lantern OS convergence threads.

identity.content: Alex likes green, nature, zombies, and RimWorld.
Alex explored self-employment opportunities during a career break, including soap and candle making, mobile game development, and growing/selling exotic houseplants.
Alex's current D&D character is a paladin named Sylvaine 'Phonk' Marquet, who took a warlock pact with a patron that consumes souls, aiming to ascend to godhood.
Phonk was born into a family of wandering performers and eventually formed a band called The Rusted Rats.
After tragedy struck and Phonk lost her family in an ambush, she was saved by an unseen figure.
She worked in a manor, honing her culinary skills, and became a hunter of flavors.
Her ultimate goal is to create the greatest cookbook ever written.
The paladin's existence drains soul energy from spirits, which harms the druid in their party, who is considered a spirit due to having died previously.
Phonk's bastion is The Emberthrone, a red-themed, high-end restaurant located beneath Klienbarch Estate.
It features throne seating for noble guests arranged in a circular pattern overlooking a central cooking pit staffed by unseen servants.
The bastion has a spicy and theatrical culinary theme centered on Phonk's monstrous cuisine.
Alex's NPC Tinfist uses a special Channel Divinity in his Oath of Conquest that brands targets with a searing smite.
The brand masks the victim and Tinfist, causing magic that targets the branded creature (e.g., scrying, sending) to instead show or contact Tinfist.
Alex is incorporating the theme of leadership and hegemony into the Warforged recognition of Tinfist's Brand.
Tinfist is deeply ambitious and willing to do dark things, but his strength is convincing people he is good for the world.
His goal is to attain freedom at any cost.
Alex is incorporating the theme of the ancient Promised Land empire into the Warforged recognition of Tinfist's Brand.
Tinfist seeks to rebuild the Promised Land.

dreams_memories.content: Orion Body Memory Line symbolic frame: body-conforming travel wear that remembers your setup.
Apparel becomes a physical interface to memory, while MCP handles verified storage, retrieval, routing, and safety.
Garment carries NFC tag or QR fallback, removable watch/phone dock, optional BLE beacon later, garment ID, wearer-owned profile link, care/wash-safe removable module.
The garment answers: garmentId, ownerId, surface, module, memoryAccess.
The first viable memory object is the Orion Charge Scarf + phone/watch dock + NFC tag + local MCP memory route.
Convergence means every memory is scored before it becomes active.

Dream Journal is a private, local-first system for capturing, analyzing, and understanding your dreams. Everything runs on your machine. Nothing is sent anywhere without your permission. Your dream data is yours alone.
Web surface: Open surfaces/dream-journal/index.html in your browser. No server required. Data saves to browser localStorage and can be exported as JSONL.
Discord surface: Type /dream in any channel where Lantern bot is present, or use !dream in text channels.
Dream Journal works for any reflection, memory, or insight. Not limited to actual dreams.
One file per month, append-only format.
Raw JSON entries—you can read and analyze them directly.
Morning Recall: Record full dream into Dream Journal (content, lucidity 0-10, emotions, tags, linked goals).
Morning Recall: Note one 'what felt off or wondrous?'
Dream Journal v2 includes persistent characters: Fox, Tower.
Dream Journal v2 includes an integrated symbolic door system.
Dream Journal v2 includes a merged symbolic-technical door system.

projects_systems.content: Alex is running a cyberpunk-themed Eberron 3077 one-shot prequel where the player characters are a black ops squad of high schoolers.
Their mission is to infiltrate a rival school, assassinate Class President Liberty, and extract biometric data.
Liberty's brain will eventually be used to create the AI Freedom, but Freedom should not be mentioned directly in the story.
Alex is designing heist-style encounters for a level 5 one-shot in a cyberpunk D&D setting, with emphasis on infiltration, extraction, and assassination challenges.
Alex wants to make massage candles in coffee mugs, targeting July to October sales, with a quality comparable to popular brands.
Alex wants to make regular candles (not massage candles) in coffee mugs, using soy wax.
Alex is creating a 4–6 hour D&D 2014 one-shot for five level 5 characters.
The scenario involves infiltrating Crossspire Academy, with rival school council members representing key challenges: one social, one enforcer, one hacker, one primalist, and one wildcard.
The adventure is balanced for a highly optimized party and will be formatted for GM Binder.
Alex is making a level 15 Genie Pact Warlock for a 2024 D&D campaign, themed around a rugged, good-aligned character whose bad luck is his greatest strength.

User is working on Lantern OS concepts that merge Spain/Spanish Abode imagery, a retrofitted villa/house/van moving toward France, the RAG Dollhouse, Lantern Ring Audio Gate MK1, Rose / Kevin C. Rose private-IP mechanism intake, and shipping lead process for an initial batch of 2.
Treat this as a public-safe/private-IP-bound convergence thread.
Product line: Lantern OS Orion Bodywear.
Positioning: body-conforming travel + wellness apparel with smart-storage and charging-ready accessories.
First launch SKU: Orion Solar Charge Scarf.
Reasoning: easier to manufacture, lower fit/return risk, less sensitive than innerwear, visually demoable, and safer than launching sensor bralettes first.

V1 scarf features: graphite travel scarf / shawl, hidden phone sleeve, watch dock loop or magnetic watch keeper, slim battery bank pocket, reflective teal safety stitching, optional solar-inspired panel look.
Outerwear SKU: Orion Body-Conforming Travel Wrap.

Travel Wrap features: scarf-shawl-harness hybrid, cross-body magnetic closure, phone sleeve at ribs, watch dock at wrist/edge, passport/card flat pocket, power-bank pocket, reflective constellation stitching.
Innerwear SKU: Orion Support Bralette — Non-Electronic v1.
Bralette v1 framing: launch as body-conforming support wear, not a sensor product.
Bralette v1 features: high-support athletic bralette, matte graphite compression fabric, teal seam mapping, soft rib-band, removable center charm/puck that is decorative or NFC-only.
Innerwear SKU: Orion Base Layer / Compression Tank.

Compression Tank features: body-conforming cropped tank or full tank, bralette support built in, hidden phone side pocket, removable watch/earbud dock patch, reflective teal seam lines, low-profile Lantern OS compass mark.
Launch order: 1 Solar Charge Scarf / Tech Travel Scarf; 2 Body-Conforming Travel Wrap; 3 Compression Tank; 4 Support Bralette; 5 True smart sensor core.
MCP tools to expose: lantern.memory.store, lantern.memory.retrieve, lantern.memory.converge, lantern.memory.list_recent, lantern.memory.redact, lantern.memory.export_manifest.

Core architecture table: Orion Smart Bralette = innerwear shell + garment ID/fit notes/removable module; Orion Compression Tank = fit profile + pocket layout preference; Orion Solar Charge Scarf = travel loadout + watch/phone dock memory; Orion Watch = confirmation device; Phone app/local web app = UI bridge; MCP API = local control plane; RAG house = memory store; Convergence loop = trust layer.

Dream Journal v2 scope: local operator dream logging, lucidity tracking, symbolic analysis, persistent character memory, Bayesian fallacy detection, Voice Lounge audio, Docker integration, merged symbolic-technical door system.
Dream Journal v2 skill status: production-ready (feature/LAN-124-dream-journal-v2).
Dream Journal API service status: ready.
Dream Journal Docker service: lightweight, single-service Dream Journal container instead of bloated multi-service unified stack.
Dream Journal Docker result: resource footprint reduced by 88% (1.8GB → 229MB), startup time from 30–45s to 2–3s, and memory usage from ~300MB to ~45MB idle.
Dream Journal deployment report status: LIVE AND RUNNING.

safety_constraints.content: Do not make the garment silently record memories.
Retrieval should require intent: Scan garment → ask 'load my Orion travel setup?' → retrieve allowed memories only.
Viable version requires intentional action: Tap watch → confirm on phone → store memory through MCP → hash into RAG manifest.
For Orion Bodywear, avoid claiming diagnosis, treatment, safety rescue, or medical monitoring unless the hardware is certified.
For v1, call it solar-inspired unless it truly charges devices.
If it actually charges, use a removable certified solar/battery module, not a homemade integrated battery pack.
Do not launch first with: heart-rate claims, respiration tracking claims, medical posture correction claims, built-in battery rail touching skin, washable electronics.
Use 'charging-ready,' 'power-bank compatible,' or 'solar-inspired textile' until the charging hardware is real and certified.

aesthetic_directives.content: Visual direction: professional 4:3 Lantern OS product concept sheet, mature industrial design board, premium wearable-tech presentation, refined black graphite rendering with teal glow accents and muted gold details.
Palette: graphite black, limestone cream, teal glow, muted gold, misty blue, subtle charcoal fabric texture.

Design details: black titanium hardware trim, teal AMOLED-style status lights, constellation motif matching Orion Watch, clean white/limestone background, product diagram style, premium wearable-tech catalog quality, realistic materials and stitching, readable labels, engineering callouts, 4:3 aspect ratio.

Product safety framing: non-sexual technical product design, adult neutral mannequin / ghost mannequin only, no nudity, no cleavage emphasis, no lingerie pose, no childlike features, no sexual framing.
